'''''Courageous''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].

During [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] hunt for the traitorous Grand Admiral [[Demetrius Zaarin]], ''Courageous'' played a central role in the task force's first two missions. In the [[Semag system/Legends|Semag system]], ''Courageous'' and its forces were responsible for disabling and capturing a Zaarin-friendly convoy and destroying its escorts, ''[[Strident]]'' and ''[[Rahmat]]''.

It was dispatched in a preemptive [[Battle of Gwar|strike]] against a traitorous fleet element and supply depot in the [[Gwar system/Legends|Gwar system]]. This was without authorization from Thrawn himself. During the raid, ''Courageous'' was destroyed by Zaarin's forces, of which was comprised of [[Starship/Legends|vessels]] including the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Imperator (Imperial-class)|''Imperator'']]. However, the ''Courageous''<nowiki/>' starfighters led by [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] were successful in destroying the platform [[XQ6 Platform]], [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] [[Bomb (Immobilizer 418 cruiser)|''Bomb'']] and [[Kuma group|Kuma]] squadron.
